name: Essential Health Checkup
description: Ideal for routine annual screening covering blood counts, sugar, and basic organ function.

name: Comprehensive Health Checkup
description: In-depth wellness screening with vitamin levels, cardiac markers, and complete organ function panels.

name: Women's Wellness Package
description: Tailored for women's health needs including hormonal evaluation, thyroid, anaemia screening, and calcium levels.

name: Senior Citizen Health Package
description: Comprehensive screening for age-related conditions including diabetes, cardiac risk, kidney health, and bone health.
